parsed.production_notes: The presenter's face exhibits uncanny smoothness and a lack of natural micro-expressions. The lip-sync is slightly imprecise, and the head movements are repetitive and rigid, strongly indicating an AI-generated avatar.

characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion. She has short, neatly styled brown hair and subtle makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Grey v-neck sweater over a pink undershirt.

panels.panel_visual_description: Extreme close-up of a person's lower face, focusing entirely on the mouth and chin. The lips are painted with pink lipstick and are slightly parted, revealing white teeth. The skin is fair with a few natural blemishes visible. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the texture of the lips and skin. The background is completely out of focus and indistinct. The framing is tight, cutting off the nose and the rest of the face.

scenes.visual_description: Extreme close-up of a woman's mouth speaking. Large yellow and white text overlays appear word-by-word in the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Your tongue is holding you back from sounding like a native speaker.
scenes.on_screen_text: Your tongue is holding you back from sounding like a native speaker

The lighting is soft and natural, illuminating her face evenly. She is looking directly at the camera with a neutral, instructional expression.
